title: azalea albiflora
intro: Azalea albiflora, also known as the white azalea, is a flowering shrub native to China and Taiwan, belonging to the Ericaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. Azalea albiflora has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Azalea albiflora, including tea, infusion, and extract, are commonly used in traditional medicine in Eastern cultures.
